Landing.metaTitle: EntrenaDojo — Run your dojo, not your spreadsheets
Landing.metaDescription: All-in-one martial arts club management: student roster, belt progression, class scheduling, QR check-in, flexible payments (Stripe, cash, Bizum), competitions, and sparring pairing. Start free.
Landing.heroSubtitle: EntrenaDojo brings your roster, belt progression, scheduling, and payments into one mobile-first place — so you can spend less time on admin and more time on the mats.
Landing.heroNote: No credit card required · Free for up to 30 students
Landing.featuresTitle: Built for the way clubs actually run
Landing.featuresSubtitle: From a student's first trial class to their black belt — and every payment, grading, and competition in between.

features.title: Multiple styles
features.desc: Teach BJJ, Karate, and Judo under one roof. Each style has its own belt system, requirements, classes, and progression — all managed from one dashboard.

features.title: Student management
features.desc: A complete roster with families, contact details, medical notes, and one-tap invites. Students track their belt rank per style.

features.title: Belt progression tracking
features.desc: Visual requirement checklists from white to black. Browse a library of common requirements by discipline, or create your own. Track progress per student per style.

features.title: Team management
features.desc: Invite admins and instructors to help run your club. Instructors see their classes and students. Admins manage everything except billing.

features.title: Class scheduling
features.desc: Build a weekly timetable across multiple styles, assign instructors, manage bookings, and track attendance from any device.

features.title: QR check-in
features.desc: Students scan a code on the wall to check themselves into class. No clipboard required.

features.title: Flexible payments
features.desc: Accept cards online via Stripe Connect or track cash, Bizum, and bank transfers manually. Each club connects their own Stripe — you get paid directly.

features.title: Competition tracking
features.desc: Log tournament entries, divisions, and medals so the whole club can celebrate wins.

features.title: Sparring pairing
features.desc: Generate fair rounds by belt and avoid repeat matchups — no whiteboard maths.

Landing.pricingTitle: Start free, upgrade when you grow
Landing.pricingSubtitle: Simple plans with no setup fees. Cancel anytime.
Landing.pricingNote: Pro pricing is indicative — billing tiers are finalised at launch.
Landing.planFreeBlurb: Everything a small dojo needs to get organised.
Landing.planProBlurb: For growing clubs that bill online and run gradings.
Landing.testimonialsTitle: Dojo owners run leaner with EntrenaDojo

testimonials.quote: We moved off three different spreadsheets and a group chat. Now belt requirements, attendance, and payments all live in one place — onboarding a new student takes a minute.
testimonials.name: Marcus Oliveira

testimonials.quote: The QR check-in alone sold my front desk. Parents love seeing their kids' belt progress, and I finally stopped chasing late memberships by hand.
testimonials.name: Aisha Rahman

testimonials.quote: Running gradings used to be a paperwork weekend. EntrenaDojo tracks every requirement per student and prints the certificates. It pays for itself.
testimonials.name: Kenji Watanabe

Landing.finalCtaTitle: Ready to run your dojo the easy way?
Landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Set up your club in under a minute. It's free to start.
Landing.footerSupports: Supports BJJ, Karate, Judo, Taekwondo & custom belt systems.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: A snapshot of your club. Metrics populate once students and classes are added.
Dashboard.noClassesTodayBody: Today's timetable is clear. Check-in counts will appear here on class days.
Dashboard.noExamsBody: Schedule a grading exam to test candidates and award belts.
Dashboard.onboardingSubtitle: Complete these steps to get your club up and running.
Dashboard.step1Desc: Add your club's description and logo so students can find you.
Dashboard.step2Desc: Configure your belt system and promotion requirements.
Dashboard.step3Desc: Set up your weekly timetable so students can book sessions.
Dashboard.step4Desc: Add a student to your roster and start tracking attendance.
Dashboard.step5Desc: Create membership plans so students can subscribe.
Dashboard.step6Desc: Enable online payments by connecting your Stripe account.

Settings.title: Club settings
Settings.subtitle: Your club's public profile, contact details, and preferences.
Settings.logoUrlHint: Link to a square image used on your public page and emails.
Settings.currencyHint: Currency used for payment plans and invoices.
Settings.childMaxAgeHint: Students at or below this age see children's belt requirements. Default: 15 (under 16).
Settings.stripeConnectDesc: Connect your Stripe account to accept online payments from members. A 3% platform fee applies to each transaction.
Settings.stripeConnected: Stripe is connected and ready to accept payments.
Settings.stripeIncomplete: Stripe onboarding is not complete. Finish setup to start accepting payments.
Settings.noClubSubtitle: Settings appear once you're signed in to a club. Register a club to get started.

Privacy.privacyIntro: EntrenaDojo is committed to protecting the privacy of club owners, instructors, and students who use our platform. This page explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
Privacy.privacyDataCollectionBody: We collect the information you provide when registering a club or student account: names, phone numbers, email addresses, and belt rank data. Attendance records are stored when students check in to classes. We do not track your browsing activity, use cookies for advertising, or sell your data to third parties.
Privacy.privacyAuthBody: EntrenaDojo uses Supabase for authentication. When you log in with your phone number, a one-time verification code is sent via SMS. Your authentication credentials are managed securely by Supabase and are never stored in our application database.
Privacy.privacyPaymentsBody: Online payments are processed through Stripe. EntrenaDojo never sees or stores your full card details. Each club connects their own Stripe account to receive payments directly. Payment records (amounts, dates, plan names) are stored in our database for billing history.
Privacy.privacyContactBody: If you have questions about your data or wish to request deletion of your account, contact us at hello@entrenadojo.app.

Admin.impersonateHint: View the app as this club's owner (coming soon).

About.aboutMission: We build tools that let martial arts instructors focus on teaching, not admin.
About.aboutStory: Running a martial arts club means wearing a dozen hats: instructor, accountant, receptionist, marketer. Most small dojos still manage their roster on spreadsheets, take attendance on a clipboard, and chase payments through WhatsApp groups. We started EntrenaDojo because we believe instructors deserve better tools — simple, affordable, and built specifically for the way clubs actually work. No bloated gym software that tries to do everything. Just the essentials, done right.
About.value1Desc: Clean, intuitive tools that don't need a manual. If it takes more than a minute to learn, we haven't done our job.
About.value2Desc: Every feature is designed around how real dojos operate — not generic fitness clubs, not enterprise gyms.
About.value3Desc: Your data belongs to you. We don't sell it, we don't track your students across the web, and we don't show ads.
About.value4Desc: BJJ, Karate, Judo, Taekwondo, Kung Fu, and beyond. EntrenaDojo adapts to your belt system, not the other way around.
About.founderBio: Software engineer and martial arts enthusiast. Joel built EntrenaDojo after seeing too many club owners buried in admin instead of teaching.

Contact.contactSubtitle: Have a question, a suggestion, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.contactWhatsAppMessage: Hi! I have a question about EntrenaDojo.
Contact.contactFormSuccess: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
Contact.contactFormError: Could not send the message. Please try again.
Contact.faq1A: Yes! EntrenaDojo is free for clubs with up to 30 students. No credit card required.
Contact.faq2A: BJJ, Karate, Judo, Taekwondo, Aikido, Kung Fu, Krav Maga, and more. You can also create a custom belt system.
Contact.faq3A: Yes. Connect your own Stripe account to accept card payments. You can also track cash, Bizum, and bank transfers manually.
